##LOCALITY=Moculta quarry, Angastan, South Australia, Australia
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Bob Jenkins
##DESCRIPTION=Clusters of pale yellow, micaceous crystals. Used in the Lafuente et al (2014) structural study.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R120092

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
